languages.text:
Wielder doesn't provoke Attacks of Opportunity and able to move through enemies.
First attack per turn doesn't spend MP and count to attack limit, but deals only 50% damage
Base Armour Property: +10% Dodge and Parry Chance

traits.locale_text:
Wielder doesn't provoke Attacks of Opportunity and able to move through enemies.
First attack per turn doesn't spend MP and count to attack limit, but deals only 50% damage
Base Armour Property: +10% Dodge and Parry Chance

languages.text: The wearer does not provoke {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}attacks of opportunity{/g} and can move through enemies. The wearer's first attack each turn does not spend {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g} and does not count toward the attack limit per turn but deals −50% less damage. Base armour property: +10% {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g}.

traits.locale_text: The wielder does not provoke attacks of opportunity and can move through enemies. The wielder's first attack in their turn does not spend MP and does not count toward attack limit per turn but deals −50% less damage. Base armour property: +10% dodge and parry.

languages.text: Kullanan kişi, {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}fırsat saldırılarını{/g} tetiklemez ve düşmanların bulunduğu hücrelerden geçebilir. Kullanan kişinin her turdaki ilk saldırısı, {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}HP{/g} harcamaz ve tur başına saldırı sınırından sayılmaz ancak verdiği hasar %50 azalır. Taban {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}zırh{/g} özelliği: +%10 {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}kaçınma{/g} ve {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}savuşturma{/g}.
languages.original_text: The wielder does not provoke {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}attacks of opportunity{/g} and can move through enemies. The wielder's first attack each turn does not spend {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g} and does not count toward the attack limit per turn but deals −50% less damage. Base {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g} property: +10% {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Kullanan kişi, fırsat saldırılarını tetiklemez ve düşmanların bulunduğu hücrelerden geçebilir. Kullanan kişinin her turdaki ilk saldırısı, HP harcamaz ve tur başına saldırı sınırından sayılmaz ancak verdiği hasar %50 azalır. Taban zırh özelliği: +%10 kaçınma ve savuşturma.

Kullanan kişi, fırsat saldırılarını tetiklemez ve düşmanların bulunduğu hücrelerden geçebilir. Kullanan kişinin her turdaki ilk saldırısı, HP harcamaz ve tur başına saldırı sınırından sayılmaz ancak verdiği hasar %50 azalır. Taban {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}zırh{/g} özelliği: +%10 {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}kaçınma{/g} ve savuşturma.

languages.text: El portador no provoca {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}ataques de oportunidad{/g} y puede pasar a través de sus enemigos. El primer ataque del portador en cada turno no gasta {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}PM{/g} y tampoco cuenta para el límite de ataques por turno, pero inflige un −50 % menos de daño. Propiedad básica de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armadura{/g}: +10 % de {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}esquiva{/g} y {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parada{/g}.
languages.original_text: The wielder does not provoke {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}attacks of opportunity{/g} and can move through enemies. The wielder's first attack each turn does not spend {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g} and does not count toward the attack limit per turn but deals −50% less damage. Base {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g} property: +10% {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g}.

traits.locale_text: El portador no provoca ataques de oportunidad y puede pasar a través de sus enemigos. El primer ataque del portador en cada turno no gasta PM y tampoco cuenta para el límite de ataques por turno, pero inflige un −50 % menos de daño. Propiedad básica de armadura: +10 % de esquiva y parada.

El portador no provoca {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}ataques de oportunidad{/g} y puede pasar a través de sus enemigos. El primer ataque del portador en cada turno no gasta {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}PM{/g} y tampoco cuenta para el límite de ataques por turno, pero inflige un −50 % menos de daño. Propiedad básica de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armadura{/g}: +10 % de {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}esquiva{/g} y {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parada{/g}.

languages.text: 装备者不会触发{g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}借机攻击{/g}，且移动时可以穿过敌人。 装备者每回合的首次攻击不消耗{g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}移动点数{/g}，也不计入该回合的攻击上限，但造成的伤害降低50%。 基础{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}护甲{/g}特性：+10%{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}闪避{/g}与{g|Encyclopedia:Parry}招架{/g}。
languages.original_text: The wielder does not provoke {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}attacks of opportunity{/g} and can move through enemies. The wielder's first attack each turn does not spend {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g} and does not count toward the attack limit per turn but deals −50% less damage. Base {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g} property: +10% {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g}.

traits.locale_text: 装备者不会触发借机攻击，且移动时可以穿过敌人。 装备者每回合的首次攻击不消耗移动点数，也不计入该回合的攻击上限，但造成的伤害降低50%。 基础护甲特性：+10%闪避与招架。

装备者不会触发{g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}借机攻击{/g}，且移动时可以穿过敌人。 装备者每回合的首次攻击不消耗{g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}移动点数{/g}，也不计入该回合的攻击上限，但造成的伤害降低50%。 基础{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}护甲{/g}特性：+10%{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}闪避{/g}与{g|Encyclopedia:Parry}招架{/g}。

languages.text: L'utilisateur ne provoque pas d'{g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}attaques d'opportunité{/g} et peut traverser les ennemis. À chaque tour, sa première attaque ne consomme pas de {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}PD{/g} et n'est pas déduite du nombre maximum d'attaques par tour, mais inflige −50 % de dégâts. Propriété d'{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armure{/g} de base : +10 % à l'{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}esquive{/g} et à la {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parade{/g}.
languages.original_text: The wielder does not provoke {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}attacks of opportunity{/g} and can move through enemies. The wielder's first attack each turn does not spend {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g} and does not count toward the attack limit per turn but deals −50% less damage. Base {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g} property: +10% {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g}.

traits.locale_text: L'utilisateur ne provoque pas d'attaques d'opportunité et peut traverser les ennemis. À chaque tour, sa première attaque ne consomme pas de PD et n'est pas déduite du nombre maximum d'attaques par tour, mais inflige −50 % de dégâts. Propriété d'armure de base : +10 % à l'esquive et à la parade.

L'utilisateur ne provoque pas d'{g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}attaques d'opportunité{/g} et peut traverser les ennemis. À chaque tour, sa première attaque ne consomme pas de {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}PD{/g} et n'est pas déduite du nombre maximum d'attaques par tour, mais inflige −50 % de dégâts. Propriété d'{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armure{/g} de base : +10 % à l'{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}esquive{/g} et à la {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parade{/g}.

L'utilisateur ne provoque pas d'{g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}attaques d'opportunité{/g} et peut traverser les ennemis. À chaque tour, sa première attaque ne consomme pas de {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}PD{/g} et n'est pas déduite du nombre maximum d'attaques par tour, mais inflige −50 % de dégâts. Propriété d'{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armure{/g} de base : +10 % à l'{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}esquive{/g} et à la {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parade{/g}.

languages.text: 使用者は機会攻撃を誘発せず、敵を通り抜けることができる。 使用者の各ターンの最初の攻撃は、MPを消費せず、ターンごとの攻撃制限にカウントされないが、ダメージが50%減少する。 基本アーマー特性：回避と受け流し+10%。
languages.original_text: The wielder does not provoke attacks of opportunity and can move through enemies. The wielder's first attack each turn does not spend MP and does not count toward the attack limit per turn but deals −50% less damage. Base armour property: +10% dodge and parry.

traits.locale_text: 使用者は機会攻撃を誘発せず、敵を通り抜けることができる。 使用者の各ターンの最初の攻撃は、MPを消費せず、ターンごとの攻撃制限にカウントされないが、ダメージが50%減少する。 基本アーマー特性：回避と受け流し+10%。
使用者は機会攻撃を誘発せず、敵を通り抜けることができる。 使用者の各ターンの最初の攻撃は、MPを消費せず、ターンごとの攻撃制限にカウントされないが、ダメージが50%減少する。 基本アーマー特性：回避と受け流し+10%。

languages.text: Der Träger provoziert keine {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}Gelegenheitsangriffe{/g} und kann sich durch Gegner bewegen. Der erste Angriff des Trägers pro Zug verbraucht keine {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}BP{/g}, fließt nicht in das Angriffslimit pro Zug ein, verursacht aber -50 % weniger Schaden. Grundeigenschaft Rüstung: +10 % {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}Ausweichen{/g} und {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}Parieren{/g}.

The wielder's first attack each turn does not spend {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g} and does not count toward the attack limit per turn but deals −50% less damage. Base {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g} property: +10% {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g}.
